description:
Hey 

At first i added the wrong clip to upload files and that was just his friend who is cheating too probably. But i would like to report Turpatero4. He was cheating in a bo3 tourney matches. There is no blatant clips from him but if good player is watching these clips, he should notice that turpatero plays way too consistent and is aware from every enemy without own team drones nearby. One of the clips he rushes top white to kids dorm without droning or checking default angles and there is not a single drone nearby. Notice from the clips that he is playing against full stack good and many season champs. I'll provide u screenshot from 3 matches where he is "very good" and in consulate he had 1-3 and my friends were winning 3-0. Then suddenly game went 5-3 for Turpateros team and he had 16-3 stats :D u can check his tracker/statscc too. He had crazy improvement when u watch his ranks and kd from seasons. He had qued with cheater too like TemuBeaulo and madrr. I hope u will consider this because we are hundred percent sure that he is cheating and mostly we are right

I will provide u now screenshot from game and link for the 4 min cheater clip i made from smaller clips. Thanks for advance :) ( i can't upload the video to files cause it was over 100mb. I can provide u those clips without connecting them together if needed or if the link doesn't work.

Link for turpotero4 cheating clip: https://files.fm/u/aam74edgx2

latest_comment.message: Sorry, we don't accept evidence from external platforms. Please upload the clip directly to our website.
